programme.title: Hope Valley: 1874
programme.desc: Rebecca is frantic with worry after the kids go missing.

programme.title: The Way Home
programme.sub-title: Show Me the Way to Go Home
programme.desc: Alice is about to graduate high school; Kat and Elliot dream of the next steps for their relationship; Del realizes she will soon be an empty-nester again.

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: On their one-year anniversary, sous chef Tom Solomon (Jason Segel) plans to surprise his girlfriend, Violet Barnes (Emily Blunt), with an engagement ring. The lovers do end up engaged, but the fact that the proposal does not go exactly as planned proves to be a harbinger of things to come. Each time they try to set a date, various obstacles stand in their way. As more and more time passes, Tom and Violet begin to wonder if perhaps their marriage is not meant to be.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Bad Words
programme.desc: Guy Trilby (Jason Bateman), a 40-year-old misanthrope, makes waves at a regional spelling bee when, due to a loophole in the rules, he is allowed to enter -- and later wins. Hurling insults at every turn, Guy advances to the national contest in Los Angeles, accompanied by a reporter (Kathryn Hahn) who wants to discover his hidden motives for entering the bee. As the competition gears up, friendless Guy inexplicably forms a bond with a young speller who is feeling parental pressure to win.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: The Five-Year Engagement
programme.desc: On their one-year anniversary, sous chef Tom Solomon (Jason Segel) plans to surprise his girlfriend, Violet Barnes (Emily Blunt), with an engagement ring. The lovers do end up engaged, but the fact that the proposal does not go exactly as planned proves to be a harbinger of things to come. Each time they try to set a date, various obstacles stand in their way. As more and more time passes, Tom and Violet begin to wonder if perhaps their marriage is not meant to be.

programme.title: The Way Home
programme.sub-title: Show Me the Way to Go Home
programme.desc: Alice is about to graduate high school; Kat and Elliot dream of the next steps for their relationship; Del realizes she will soon be an empty-nester again.

programme.title: Love on the Menu
programme.desc: A popular chef rejects the idea of creating a gourmet frozen food line when the idea is presented by a food executive. But when the restaurant he runs with his wife faces financial problems, he reluctantly makes a deal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mystery 101
programme.desc: A young writer's research prompts police to revisit a famous murder case that convicted Amy's colleague at Elmstead; Travis and Amy get a second chance at clearing the professor's name.

programme.title: Mystery Island: Play for Keeps
programme.desc: Mystery Island hosts a corporate retreat with a guest being Emilia's ex-fiancé. Old feelings become complicated, tensions run high and allegations arise when a guest is found dead.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Landis, the school inspector, arrives in town and causes trouble for Elizabeth; Rosemary finds her calling; a search is called when one of Hope Valley's residents is lost; Carson and Faith's relationship is put to the test.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Days of our Lives
programme.desc: Chanel and Lani catch up; Stephanie leans on Jeremy; Theo opens up to Gabi; Rafe and Cat revisit the DiMera medical mystery.

programme.title: Mom
programme.desc: Bonnie has an unexpected reaction when she learns that Adam's bar is doing well; Christy and Tammy go on a double date.

programme.title: Mom
programme.sub-title: Finger Guns and a Beef Bourguignon
programme.desc: Christy discovers her new job at a law firm isn't quite what she expected; Bonnie's therapist pushes her to confront her problem with procrastination.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Sandra and Jerry are getting married; when Jonah's attempt to help the caterers and Dina's obsession with security threaten to derail it all, it falls on Amy to make sure Sandra's big day isn't ruined; Garrett struggles with his best-man toast.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: After Cloud 9 receives a new cereal bar, Amy and Jonah speculate on Zephra's ulterior motives; Dina enlists Cheyenne's help in dealing with a scammer; Garrett tries to con Glenn into giving him paid time off.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: When a new computer program is introduced at Abbott, Janine is excited to finally help Barbara with something; Barbara is reluctant to accept change and finds herself in a tricky situation; Melissa surprises Jacob.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: After a negative teacher review, Janine gets a confidence boost when a student gets transferred from Melissa's class into hers; Jacob tries to forge a friendship with an uninterested Gregory.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: Janine convinces Ava to start a gifted program at Abbott led by Jacob; Barbara pushes a hesitant Melissa to start dating again.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: Janine and Gregory have a night out; Melissa, Barbara and Mr. Johnson have a movie night.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: When a new computer program is introduced at Abbott, Janine is excited to finally help Barbara with something; Barbara is reluctant to accept change and finds herself in a tricky situation; Melissa surprises Jacob.

programme.desc: After a negative teacher review, Janine gets a confidence boost when a student gets transferred from Melissa's class into hers; Jacob tries to forge a friendship with an uninterested Gregory.

programme.title: Abbott Elementary
programme.desc: Janine and Gregory have a night out; Melissa, Barbara and Mr. Johnson have a movie night.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: While the DMV crew awaits payday, everyone scrambles for side gigs; Colette and Ceci attempt to pull Barb out of a pyramid scheme that quickly proves more alluring than any of them anticipated.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Sam and Jay try to replace their broken water heater, but Isaac turns the upgrade into a campaign issue in his bid to represent the basement ghosts; Kyle finds himself becoming the messenger between Sass and Bela.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire look for answers regarding a past tragedy that once put their relationship in jeopardy.

Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Elsbeth
programme.desc: After a powerful patriarch is stabbed with a sword at New York's most exclusive debutante ball, Elsbeth must engage in combat with the imperious ball director.

programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.desc: While in Los Angeles to receive cosmetic injectables certification, Peter tries to track down Maria Menounos and Mindy runs into Casey.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Mindy Project
programme.desc: When Cliff breaks up with Mindy over Casey, she plans to win him back; Danny tricks Mindy into going to see his dad in the desert.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: A young married couple must choose between saving the wife's life or their future ability to start a family; when Dr. Lim must take care of some personal business, she asks Dr. Murphy and Dr. Reznick to oversee the emergency room.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun recalls his own past to help an intellectually disabled teenager face separation from his mother; Claire is put between an injured teenage rock climber and her worried parents; Glassman's post-op hallucinations force him to confront a tragedy.

programme.title: Country at Heart
programme.desc: A struggling country singer meets a Nashville songwriter in need of inspiration. Teaming up to write a song, their work gets complicated but results in both a hit song and true love.

programme.title: Blind Date Book Club
programme.desc: A bookstore owner finds love and direction in her life when she agrees to review a famous author's new novel.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Elizabeth finally realizes who she is supposed to be with; big changes are coming to Hope Valley; the town rallies together to say goodbye and good luck to one of its own.

programme.title: Days of our Lives
programme.desc: Cat and Chad have an awkward reunion; Philip and Gabi share a little romance; Leo stalks Javi's new boyfriend online; EJ kicks Gwen out of the DiMera mansion; Theo remains hopeful Lexie will return to him.

programme.title: Mom
programme.sub-title: Triple Dip and an Overhand Grip
programme.desc: Bonnie and Tammy revisit childhood memories on a trip to their old foster home; Christy and Jill regret accepting a date with two guys from their Alcoholics Anonymous meetings.

programme.title: The 40 Year-Old Virgin

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: The Boss
programme.desc: Wealthy CEO Michelle Darnell (Melissa McCarthy) always gets her way, until she's busted for insider trading and sent to federal prison. After leaving jail, Darnell finds herself broke, homeless and hated. Luckily, she tracks down former assistant Claire (Kristen Bell), the only person who's willing to help. While staying with Claire and her young daughter, the ex-con devises a new business model for a brownie empire. Unfortunately, some old enemies stand in the way of her return to the top.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
